title: Microsoft D365 CE Solution Consultant
location: VERDE, Roberta Hirša iela 1A, Riga, Latvia, LV-1045

summary.lv: Vivicta SIA meklē Microsoft D365 CE Risinājumu Konsultantu, kurš realizēs un konfigurēs Dynamics 365 Customer Engagement risinājumus klientiem. Hibrīds darbs Rīgā, atalgojums €2400–3200 mēnesī.
summary.en: Vivicta SIA is seeking a Microsoft D365 CE Solution Consultant to implement and configure Dynamics 365 Customer Engagement solutions for clients in a hybrid role in Riga, offering €2,400–3,200/month.
